p.text: A black number on mint green background:

Math.text: Array[[kappa ^ star assign absent, infimum _ (w element-of Y), delimited-⟨⟩@(list@(T, w))], [, , A * w - g element-of C * X _ +]]

p.text: Table C.5: Prompt to Choose Representative Landmarks for Each Cluster

inline-block.p: You have been provided with a set of similar documents, each indexed by a number. Your task is to identify the most representative example from this cluster of documents. Please carefully analyze the given documents and select one document that best captures the common essence and characteristics of the samples. The selection should emphasize the representativeness and relevance of the chosen sample to the category, so that it can serve as a reference for labeling the entire cluster.
Please choose one document that could best serve as a reference for labeling the entire cluster, and return only the index number of your selection, in format such as [0], [1], etc.
